security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com https://archive.org; img-src 'self' data: https: http:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.youtube.com; media-src 'self' https: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.longDescription: Daily consistency for self-paced courses. Import MIT OCW, watch lectures, take timestamped notes.
